results.title: Security intensified across Delhi as Cockroach Janta Party protests in Jantar Mantar
results.description: Earlier in the day, the CJP announced that it had received permission to hold the protest at Jantar Mantar

results.title: Iran strike claim raises Gulf alert
results.description: Arabian Post Staff -Dubai Iran’s Revolutionary Guard said it had launched missile strikes on “enemy bases in the region” after US forces hit targets near the Strait of Hormuz, pushing Gulf states into a new security alert as sirens sounded in Kuwait and Bahrain. Guard commanders framed the operation as retaliation for US strikes on Iranian coastal positions around Sirik and Qeshm Island, both close to one [...] The article Iran strike claim raises Gulf alert appeared first on Arabian Post .

results.title: US military says it shot down Iranian missiles, drones launched toward Gulf allies, Strait of Hormuz
results.description: The exchange of strikes comes as the Trump administration ramps up pressure on Iran to make a deal to end the conflict

results.title: Trump’s Abraham Accords push puts Pakistan and Bangladesh under scrutiny: Report
results.description: Jerusalem, June 6, 2026 US President Donald Trump’s latest diplomatic effort aimed at normalising ties with Israel under the expanded Abraham Accords framework has brought Pakistan and Bangladesh under heightened international scrutiny, a report has highlighted. President Trump recently announced that countries including Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt, Jordan, Bahrain, and the United Arab [...] The post Trump’s Abraham Accords push puts Pakistan and Bangladesh under scrutiny: Report appeared first on Yes Punjab News .
